overview: Modern Education Consult is a professional international education and career consultancy website. It features a full-stack admin panel with blog management, comments, applications & leads, and a WordPress-style visual website builder for editing all static pages.
features: WordPress-style visual website builder with live preview and click-to-edit
Section-based page editing with drag-and-drop reorder, add, and delete
Data-driven pages rendered from backend storage
Global Website Controls for logo, footer, navigation menu
14 hardcoded blog posts with full rich text editor and image sliders
Blog comments system with admin moderation and approval workflow
Applications & Leads management with WhatsApp notifications
Country Apply button pre-fill on contact form
